projectionRules: Render the promoted visual proof model as a reviewable HTML proof document.
Include story text, authority posture, stage handoff packet table, artifact hashes, and receipt paths.
Do not invent nodes or edges outside the promoted visual model.
Embed the same source model hash used by the ASCII projection receipt.
completionPosture: The HTML proof document is valid only when projected from the same promoted visual model as the ASCII proof surface.
